description: Style Note Casual dressing only gets better with these slip-on sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality - they're a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Product Details Single piece leather upper covering the forefoot and mid-foot for maximum durability, breathable comfort and style Cushioned lining for added comfort Stitch detailing for added strength Cushioned, leather foot-bed for maximum sweat-free protection and all-day comfort with printed branding Upper stitched to outsole for maximum durability Curved TPU outsole in ergonomic design with multi directional lugs for maximum grip on smooth surfaces Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
